posts.text: Looks like Trump wants Venezuela to become the 51st of the Union all because of a baseball game. Will forever wonder now what he would have said if Puerto Rico were playing the US team in the WBC final. Baseball is not apolitical. It's always political.
Team USA was gifted the @WBCBaseball semifinal against Team DR last night. That was a ball.

We picked another good one.


The Latino Newsletter (@LatNewsletter)

Our production team is in Houston today for the Puerto Rico-Italy @WBCBaseball quarterfinal game. We are speaking with Puerto Rico fans for our upcoming AMERICAN COLONY podcast this summer.





— https://nitter.net/LatNewsletter/status/2032869765090263312#m
I want a day like Dowman's.
First, Arsenal and then Puerto Rico. I love sports.

🎧 Saturday morning 

Baby Can I Hold You by Tracy Chapman on @PandoraMusic

Strong story about Latino neighbor reactions to White Stadium work in Boston.


The Latino Newsletter (@LatNewsletter)

The March 13 edition of @LatNewsletter  is by Rosanna Marinelli of @elplanetaboston 

How Boston’s New Stadium Plans May Impact Latino Residents?

Could a merger between GBH and WBUR save the public media giants? One of the stations is open to exploring the idea.

By ⁦@aidanfitzryan⁩ of ⁦@BostonGlobe⁩  bostonglobe.com/2026/03/12/b…

Looks like the USA @WBCBaseball team will be ok in the end.


Julio Ricardo Varela (@julito77)

Love the Team USA @WBCBaseball fan panic. Suddenly, USA fans care about this so-called meaningless tournament. If the USA doesn't make the quarterfinals, you can all root for Puerto Rico, since you all think PR is part of the USA anyway (even though many Puerto Ricans would disagree). Jejeje.



— https://nitter.net/julito77/status/2031844997478109371#m
